title: Junior Business Development Manager at Select CityWalk

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Select CityWalk
jsonLd.description:
Select CityWalk, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Jaipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Select CityWalk:
Select CityWalk is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Select CityWalk!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
